claim_bullets.bullet_text: Now that we know about iterables, we can rewrite our iterable operations as generators. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.243-245)
We can do the same thing with our other operations like filterWith and untilWith. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.243-245)

source_record_text: Chapter on rewriting iterable operations in JavaScript Allongé, focusing on how generators can simplify the implementation of iterable operations.
